title: Batoon's Modpacks: PVP Utility's
description: Play PVP? Well this is the perfect modpack for you.
body:
This modpack is made for PvP fans who want an advantage in battles while keeping the game smooth and fun.

It includes mods that boost situational awareness and improve visual clarity. For example, Armor HUD shows armor durability and protection, while Low Fire reduces the fire overlay so it doesn’t block your view during fights. Other PvP-friendly mods like Low Shield lessen shield obstruction, helping you concentrate on your opponents. 

Keystroke mods like Hippo Keystrokes and TipTapShow allow you to see your key presses and click speed in real time. 

Together, these mods create a focused and competitive setting, making it easier for players to concentrate on strategy, reaction time, and skilled combat.
